narrative:
Liberty Local Sd (Trumbull) school district has 8,710 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 35.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 23.6 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +8.5% D−R vs +29.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
